examples.name: E-commerce Price Tracker Integration
examples.goal: Integrate Amazon affiliate API for real-time price tracking
steps: Set up Amazon Product Advertising API credentials
Build rate-limited API client with caching
Integrate with price alert notification system
examples.context: Production ChipRadar system with existing users, e-commerce domain, revenue-critical

most_likely_failure.scenario: Amazon API rate limits exceeded during peak hours, causing cascading alert delays
most_likely_failure.root_cause: No circuit breaker or fallback strategy defined

tail_risks.scenario: Amazon affiliate account revoked for TOS violation
Price data inaccuracy leads to user trust loss or liability

key_mitigations: Implement circuit breaker with exponential backoff (critical)
Add stale-data cache fallback for API unavailability (critical)
Price accuracy validation with confidence thresholds (high)
hidden_assumptions: Amazon API remains accessible and affordable
Product IDs (ASINs) are stable over time

examples.name: Database Schema Migration
examples.goal: Migrate from SQLite to PostgreSQL for production scaling
examples.context: Production database with customer data, high risk, requires zero downtime

most_likely_failure.scenario: Migration runs longer than planned, extends maintenance window
most_likely_failure.root_cause: Underestimated data volume or query performance

tail_risks.scenario: Rollback fails because old system state incompatible

key_mitigations: 3-2-1 backup strategy (3 copies, 2 media, 1 offsite) - critical
Dry-run migration on production dataset before actual cutover - critical
Blue-green deployment with instant rollback - critical
Data integrity checksums at each stage - high
early_warning_indicators: Migration script running >50% over dry-run time

examples.name: Feature Launch - Social Sharing
examples.goal: Add social media sharing and viral tracking to ChipRadar

most_likely_failure.scenario: Low adoption because sharing UX is too many clicks
most_likely_failure.root_cause: Friction not tested with real users

tail_risks.scenario: Social platform blocks app for spam-like behavior

key_mitigations: Test sharing flow with 5 beta users (high)
Rate limit share generation per user (medium)
Fallback to copy-link for blocked platforms (low)
